title: arabis muralis var. saxigena
intro: Arabis muralis var. saxigena, also known as the rock cress, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, helping to treat wounds and skin conditions such as eczema. The health benefits of Arabis muralis var. saxigena include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments.
